ast.name: error
ast.source: Couldn't convert value into a JSON string:
ast.target: 无法将值转换为 JSON 字符串：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Datacore: Failed to import file:

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, splits up views into pages of results which can be traversed via buttons at the top and bottom of the view. This substantially improves the performance of large views, and can help with visual clutter. Note that this setting can also be set on a per-view basis.
ast.target: 启用后，会将视图拆分为多页结果，可通过视图顶部和底部的按钮浏览。这将显著提升大型视图的性能，并有助于减少视觉杂乱。注意，此设置也可按视图单独配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of entries to show per page, by default. This can be overriden on a per-view basis.
ast.target: 默认每页显示的条目数。可按视图单独覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, table that are paged will scroll to the top of the table when the page changes. This can be overriden on a per-view basis.
ast.target: 启用后，分页的表格在页面切换时会滚动到表格顶部。可按视图单独覆盖此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default format that dates are rendered in. Uses luxon date formatting (https://github.com/moment/luxon/blob/master/docs/formatting.md#formatting-with-tokens-strings-for-cthulhu).
ast.target: 日期渲染的默认格式。使用 luxon 日期格式化（https://github.com/moment/luxon/blob/master/docs/formatting.md#formatting-with-tokens-strings-for-cthulhu）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default format that date-times are rendered in. Uses luxon date formatting (https://github.com/moment/luxon/blob/master/docs/formatting.md#formatting-with-tokens-strings-for-cthulhu).
ast.target: 日期时间渲染的默认格式。使用 luxon 日期格式化（https://github.com/moment/luxon/blob/master/docs/formatting.md#formatting-with-tokens-strings-for-cthulhu）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, inline fields will be parsed in all documents. Finding inline fields requires a full text scan through each document, which noticably slows down indexing for large vaults. Disabling this functionality will mean metadata will only come from tags, links, and Properties / frontmatter
ast.target: 启用后，将解析所有文档中的内联字段。查找内联字段需要对每个文档进行全文扫描，这会明显降低大型库的索引速度。禁用此功能后，元数据将仅来自标签、链接和 Properties / frontmatter

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of importer threads to use for parsing metadata.
ast.target: 用于解析元数据的导入器线程数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How much CPU time each importer thread should use, as a fraction (0.1 - 1.0).
ast.target: 每个导入器线程应使用的 CPU 时间占比（0.1 - 1.0）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum depth that objects will be rendered to (i.e., how many levels of subproperties will be rendered by default). This avoids infinite recursion due to self-referential objects and ensures that rendering objects is acceptably performant.
ast.target: 对象将被渲染的最大深度（即默认渲染多少层子属性）。这可避免由于对象自引用导致的无限递归，并确保对象渲染具有可接受的性能。
